metric_name: Repricing memo date and distribution
metric_value: Memo dated August 11, 2001; from Pete Kastner; to: Sales and Research
notes: Opening header of the memo establishing authorship and audience

metric_name: Repricing memo subject
metric_value: New Master Price List
notes: Official subject line of the repricing memo

metric_name: Stated purpose of repricing
metric_value: Rationalize current price list with eye on simplifying services and add-ons
notes: Verbatim rationale from memo: 'Things are now more simplified'

metric_name: Introductory AAS price and terms
metric_value: One-time-only; 6-month duration; $6,000; includes half-day of consulting
notes: New introductory retainer established by the repricing memo

metric_name: Five retainer types in Master Price List
metric_value: Base days only; base plus collateral project; Alschuler e-Business@Aberdeen; Hurley security service; PES
notes: Complete enumeration of the five AAS retainer types

metric_name: Base retainer pricing formula
metric_value: $7,000 annual base access + per diems × days; example: 2-day VP retainer = $6,000 × 2 + $7,000
notes: Explicit formula and worked example given in the memo

metric_name: Existing retainer client renewal policy
metric_value: Existing retainer clients should be renewed at current rates (grandfathered)
notes: Grandfather clause protecting existing client relationships during repricing

metric_name: Add-on combinations available to base retainer
metric_value: ETI content/pubs; additional analyst days; e-Business and security retainers can add more surveys
notes: Flexible add-on menu supporting the modular retainer design

metric_name: Emerging companies / first-time client discount
metric_value: ~15% discount on initial base-day and publication add-ons when purchasing introductory AAS
notes: Discount applies to emerging companies and small first-time clients only

metric_name: Effect of ~15% discount on pricing schedule
metric_value: Eliminates the previously separate emerging-companies pricing schedule
notes: Simplification goal achieved by folding emerging-company discount into standard pricing

metric_name: Three per-diem rate classes
metric_value: List price (non-retainer clients); AAS Rate (retainer clients); Days 3-N (projects > 2 days)
notes: Three-tier per-diem structure established by repricing memo

metric_name: Days 3-N rate rationale
metric_value: Aimed at improving billability with reasonable prices
notes: Explicit rationale stated in memo for the Days 3-N pricing class

metric_name: Retainer client publication project discount
metric_value: Retainer clients receive discount on publication projects to reflect accumulated client knowledge and as relationship incentive
notes: Relationship-driven incentive to deepen retainer engagement

metric_name: Headcount by labor class as of July 1, 2001
metric_value: Senior Exec: 2; VP: 7; Director: 25; Senior Analyst: 8; Analyst: 4; Total: 46
notes: Exact headcount from consulting-revenue-analysis spreadsheet; as-of date July 1, 2001

metric_name: Client Profile template last-updated date and fields captured
metric_value: Last updated August 1, 2000; captures: Organizational Structure; value proposition; 'what company says vs actually does'; products/services; target markets; key competitive facts; key differentiators (positive & negative); positioning analysis; financial highlights (Public/Private, revenue, growth %, profits)
notes: Nine distinct data categories in the Client Profile template

metric_name: Aberdeen Impact deliverable format
metric_value: 2-page document on Aberdeen Impact paper stock plus HTML/PDF versions
notes: Physical and digital format specifications for the Aberdeen Impact deliverable

metric_name: Aberdeen Impact research basis and review process
metric_value: Based on single 2-4 hour Research Meeting briefing plus supporting materials; client receives one round of review and comments before sign-off
notes: Input scope and editorial process for Aberdeen Impact production

metric_name: Aberdeen Impact web rights license
metric_value: Non-exclusive 1-year license to post on client intranet and/or public WWW site
notes: License terms granted with Aberdeen Impact purchase

metric_name: Market Knowledge Proposal engagement structure
metric_value: 1-day on-site engagement; 4-6 hour meeting agenda; project team of 2 analysts on-site (one Research Director or VP)
notes: Core engagement parameters from the Market Knowledge Proposal Template

metric_name: Market Knowledge on-site meeting agenda items
metric_value: Introductions/Expectations; Aberdeen Market Definition; Client View of Market; Market Trends Dynamics & Attractiveness; Competitive Landscape with competitor evolution model; Positioning Strategy Options; Review Findings + Action Plan
notes: Seven agenda items for the 1-day Market Knowledge on-site meeting

metric_name: Optional Strategy Validation interview project goals
metric_value: Validates one of six standard goals: target markets; demand; market awareness; user requirements; go-to-market strategy; licensing opportunities
notes: Six predefined strategic validation objectives available as an add-on to Market Knowledge engagement
